title: Secure Hybrid AI Development Hub
purpose: Deterministic local control plane for policy-safe hybrid AI development
implemented_scope: Phases 0–6 with live research, real secrets, and cloud transmission disabled
unresolved_risks: Live research, SearXNG, real secret backends, and cloud transmission remain disabled until separately approved; cloud adapters, orchestration, deployment, and regulated pilot phases are not implemented
Installed small models are evaluated only for plumbing, not production coding quality
Same-user direct runtime database access and local approver identity require operational hardening before regulated use
Quality execution requires Linux Landlock and user/PID/IPC/UTS/network namespace support; Windows executables are denied
Secret and regulated-data scanners have documented false-positive and false-negative limits
